messages.content:
﻿
Translate to English:
A mi no me gusta
tomar café.

I don't like
to drink coffee.

﻿
Translate to English:
¿Vas a comer una hamburguesa?
Are you going to eat a hamburger?

﻿
What is the preterit tense
of "abordar" in
the "ustedes"
form?
A. Abordaron
B. Abordamos
C. Abordo
The preterit tense of "abordar" in the "ustedes" form is A. Abordaron.

﻿
Choose the correct conjugation of the verb "beber" for the pronoun below:
Yo
A. bebió
B. bebí
C. bebiste
The correct conjugation of the verb "beber" for the pronoun "yo" is B. bebí.

﻿
How do you say "to go on a day trip"?
A. Leer
B. Comprar
C. Hacer
una excursion
C. Hacer una excursión.

﻿
Translate to English:
Usted va de vacaciones a Europa.
A. You are going on vacation in Europe. B. You are going on vacation in Africa. C. She is going on vacation in Europe.
A. You are going on vacation in Europe.

﻿
Joseph wants to
go on board What does
he want to do?
A. Pescar
B. Abordar
C. Viajar
B. Abordar.

﻿
Translate to English:
Viajaste a las montañas?
A. Did you travel to the mountains?
B. Did they travel to the mountains? C. Did you travel to the wetlands?
A. Did you travel to the mountains?

﻿
What does "la playa" mean in English?
?
A. The beach
B. The travel agency
C. The hotel
A. The beach.

﻿
Translate the below houn
to Spanish:
the flight
A. El vuelo
B. El boleto
C. La maleta
A. El vuelo.

﻿
Which of the following is a compound sentence?
A. Yo viaje a Italia.
B. Comiste una hamburguesa?
C. Viajaste a Italia el mes pasado o el año pasado?
C. Viajaste a Italia el mes pasado o el año pasado? (because it has two independent clauses connected by the coordinating conjunction "o").
